CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, dt DATE);
CREATE TABLE date_summary AS SELECT id, dayofyear(dt) AS day_of_year FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, dayofyear(dt) FROM test_dates WHERE dt >= DATE '2020-01-01' AND dt <= DATE '2020-12-31';
SELECT id, dayofyear(dt) AS day_of_year FROM (SELECT dt FROM test_dates WHERE dt < DATE '2021-01-01') AS sub;
SELECT id, dt, dayofyear(dt) AS day_of_year FROM test_dates ORDER BY day_of_year ASC;
SELECT AVG(dayofyear(dt)) AS average_day_of_year FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE join_test AS SELECT a.id, dayofyear(a.dt) AS day_of_year, b.other_column FROM test_dates AS a JOIN other_table AS b ON a.id = b.foreign_id;
SELECT a.id, dayofyear(a.dt), b.other_column FROM test_dates AS a JOIN other_table AS b ON a.id = b.foreign_id WHERE dayofyear(a.dt) BETWEEN 1 AND 366;
